title: Cinaci 5 Pieces Soft Stretchy Baby Girl Wide Headbands with Bow Headwraps Hair Bows Bands Accessories for Baby Boys Girls Newborns Infants Toddlers
features: Soft and Stretchy Material: These baby girl headbands are made from high-quality nylon fabric that is super soft and stretchy. The gentle material ensures comfort without causing irritation, making these nylon bow headbands for infants perfect for sensitive skin. Your little one will stay cozy while looking adorable in every bow headband for baby girls.

Ideal Size for Growing Babies: Each bow headband for toddler girls measures approximately 9cm (3.5 inches) wide with a 16cm (6.3 inches) diameter. The stretchy design allows the headband to fit newborns, infants, toddlers, and kids comfortably without leaving marks, making these newborn headbands a great choice as your baby grows.

Attractive 5 Solid Colors: The set includes five beautiful solid colors: ivory, coral pink, pink, purple, and red. These versatile colors blend easily with any outfit, making these bow headbands for baby girls perfect for mixing and matching, helping your little one stand out in style at any event or everyday wear.

Adorable Design With Big Bows: Each nylon bow headband for infants features a large, soft bow placed in the center, adding a charming and stylish touch. These bow headbands for toddler girls are designed to be eye-catching while remaining gentle on your baby's head, ensuring a cute look without discomfort or marks.

Perfect for Many Occasions: These baby girl headbands are suitable for birthday parties, photo shoots, special events, or simple daily wear. Comfortable and charming, this set of bow headbands for baby girls makes dressing up your little one easy and fun, creating lasting memories on any occasion.
description: Cinaci 5 Pieces Soft Stretchy Baby Girl Wide Headbands with Bow Headwraps Hair Bows Bands Accessories for Baby Boys Girls Newborns Infants Toddlers Specifications: Material: These bow headbands are made of high quality nylon fabric, super soft and stretchy. Stretchy and soft enough, the headband won't leave any marks on baby's head. -Occasion: Birthday party, photo shoot, special occasions, daily wear, and so on. Package includes: 5 pieces baby girl bow headbands in the package.
